strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent ecosystems, founded test runner library)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Limited demonstrated depth in Kotlin/Java for backend services beyond older robotics work
No explicit mention of cloud/Kubernetes depth beyond AWS CDK and self-hosted k8s for a side project
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well past the 6-year bar, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node/React experience, a current focus on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, and a strong testing and craftsmanship orientation. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js experience and only light recent Kotlin/Java work, but the overall profile aligns closely with the role's primary stack and responsibilities.
